news.title: Iran says Strait of Hormuz is closed again as vessels attempting to cross come under fire
news.description: Iranian officials say they have closed the strait because of the U.S.'s ongoing blockade of its ports.

news.title: We spoke to over 30 central bankers, policymakers and politicians. Here are their top concerns
news.description: From stagflation to energy security, policymakers spoke to CNBC about the biggest risks arising from the ongoing U.S.-Iran war.

news.title: Berkshire shares left behind as S&P 500 rallies to record high
news.description: While the overall market was soaring over the past two weeks, Berkshire wasn't doing much of anything, as its shares slipped to MTD drops of just under 1%.

news.title: Nvidia's once-tight bond with gamers is cracking over AI, 'and that breaks my heart'
news.description: Gamers once helped save Nvidia from bankruptcy. Now they feel left behind as the memory crunch drives focus to AI chips and DLSS 5 disrupts game design.

news.title: No escape: U.S.-Iran war, $4 gas, have taken all the fun out of consumer spending
news.description: Consumers are still spending amid U.S.-Iran war and $4 gas prices, but there's a pullback at entertainment and dining venues hitting local economies hard.

news.title: These chipmakers and other stocks are overbought after the market rally this week
news.description: Investors should be on the lookout for pullbacks in rallying chipmakers and other stocks after the market's advance.

news.title: 'It's just scale': Local mom-and-pop car dealerships are growing or dying amid industry consolidation, rise of mega-retailers
news.description: Multibillion-dollar dealerships have been on the rise amid a decadeslong consolidation that has led to a grow-or-die mentality for many U.S. auto retailers.

news.title: Kevin Warsh wants to lead a scandal-ridden Fed. His wealth is a complication
news.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass., is calling attention to potential issues in the Fed chair nominee's financial disclosures.

news.title: Mortgage rates show signs of falling after Iran war peak
news.description: Major lenders make rate reductions as markets take some heart from a possible truce in the Iran war.

news.title: 'I'm the lucky one' - more than one in three young men now live with their parents
news.description: Last year, the highest proportion of men aged 20-34 were still living at home since at least 2007 as the rising cost of living takes hold.

news.title: Oil prices plunge as Iran says Strait of Hormuz 'open' during ceasefire
news.description: Brent crude sinks by a tenth after Iran says the key waterway is open for commercial ships for the rest of the ceasefire.

news.title: Finance ministers and top bankers raise serious concerns about Mythos AI model
news.description: Experts say Mythos potentially has an unprecedented ability to identify and exploit cyber-security weaknesses.

news.title: UK petrol and diesel prices fall after weeks of rises
news.description: Drivers have seen weeks of increases as the US-Israeli war with Iran pushed up wholesale oil prices.

news.title: Tinder and Zoom offer 'proof of humanity' eye-scans to combat AI
news.description: The tech aims to identify people's irises and stop the rise of fake accounts and malicious scams.

news.title: Rising value of Pokémon cards sparks smash and grab crime spree
news.description: Small shops across the UK are being targeted by thieves stealing collectibles worth thousands of pounds.

news.title: Could a digital twin make you into a 'superworker'?
news.description: Firms say digital twins make staff more productive, but are they a potential legal minefield?

news.title: Here are 3 forces that drove a remarkable, record-setting week on Wall Street
news.description: The S&P 500 closed above 7,100 for the first time as it completed its fastest turnaround since 1990.

news.title: Nvidia's once-tight bond with gamers is cracking over AI, 'and that breaks my heart'
news.description: Gamers once helped save Nvidia from bankruptcy. Now they feel left behind as the memory crunch drives focus to AI chips and DLSS 5 disrupts game design.

news.title: Jim Cramer on the market's 'remarkable' rally — and what to watch in a big earnings week ahead
news.description: Jim Cramer says this is one of the most "remarkable" rallies he's seen, and provides guidance for the week ahead.

news.title: OpenAI loses multiple executives in latest leadership shakeup
news.description: Their exits come just weeks after Fidji Simo, OpenAI's product and business chief, announced she would take a medical leave.

news.title: Perspective: AI demand is inflated, and only Anthropic is being realistic
news.description: The main usage metric for artificial intelligence, called tokens, looks explosive on paper, but it may be significantly overstated.

news.title: AI chipmaker Cerebras files to go public after scrapping IPO plans last year
news.description: Cerebras said that it can expand its business with OpenAI over the coming years and that it gave OpenAI a warrant to purchase stock.

news.title: Trump says he had 'no idea' Anthropic's Amodei met with White House about Mythos
news.description: The meeting comes less than two months after President Donald Trump blacklisted Anthropic's Claude.

news.title: AMD, Oracle, Microsoft and the IGV lead a monster week for tech stocks
news.description: Oracle, AMD and Microsoft had major benchmarks, while Intel, Broadcom, Micron, Marvell and ON Semiconductor have all roared in April.

伊朗封锁霍尔木兹海峡 谈判前景难料
chinaNews.description: 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军18日发表声明称，由于美国违反停火承诺，未解除对伊朗港口和船只的海上封锁，因此从当天傍晚起封锁霍尔木兹海峡。
